failure.symptom: Requires Lemmy backend API. Bug confirmed via source: MdLink.svelte lacks target attribute on <a> tag. All links open in same tab. Fix adds target={photonified ? '_self' : '_blank'} — internal (photonified) links open in same tab, external links open in new tab.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Lemmy 后端。Bug：外部链接缺 target=_blank
